# Initial Database Setup

This file contains the initial migration for setting up the TradeBot database.

## Generated by: dotnet ef migrations add InitialCreate

This migration creates the following tables:
- WeaponPrices
- ArmorPrices

Migration details are managed automatically by Entity Framework Core.

## Migration Status

Migration is managed manually by console commands like 
dotnet ef database update _migrationName_

To create new migrations after modifying entities, see [MIGRATIONS_GUIDE.md](../MIGRATIONS_GUIDE.md).
